S.FORM: Ralph Bishop sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 10, Ralph Bishop, squliql na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1974) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ralpńß ő≤is~…ēńßop s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj **** , rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ralpńß ő≤is~…ēńßop, s~…ēquliql na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
